title: Tallest Mountains
summary: The world's highest Himalaya and Karakoram peaks plus famous global mountains become elevation, prominence, history, and fame challenges.

audience.readingLevel: short mountain facts with rounded elevation comparisons

sources.label: Wikipedia list of highest mountains on Earth
sources.note: Primary source for top-ranked Himalaya and Karakoram elevations, prominence, and ascent years.

sources.label: Wikipedia Seven Summits
sources.note: Context for famous continental high points such as Kilimanjaro, Denali, Aconcagua, and Vinson.

sources.label: Wikimedia mountain articles
sources.note: Individual linked mountain pages are used for special-case facts and famous non-Himalayan peaks.

cards.name: Mount Everest
cards.fact: Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level and is known in Nepal as Sagarmatha and in Tibet as Chomolungma.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Everest special?
How does Mount Everest's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: K2
cards.fact: K2 is the second-highest mountain on Earth and is famous for steep routes and severe Karakoram weather.
readingPrompts: What makes K2 special?
How does K2's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Kangchenjunga
cards.fact: Kangchenjunga is the world's third-highest mountain and rises on the border of Nepal and India.
readingPrompts: What makes Kangchenjunga special?
How does Kangchenjunga's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Lhotse
cards.fact: Lhotse sits next to Everest and has one of the most dramatic south faces in the Himalaya.
readingPrompts: What makes Lhotse special?
How does Lhotse's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Makalu
cards.fact: Makalu is a sharply pyramid-shaped Himalayan giant east of Everest.
readingPrompts: What makes Makalu special?
How does Makalu's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Cho Oyu
cards.fact: Cho Oyu is often called one of the more approachable eight-thousanders, though it is still extremely high.
readingPrompts: What makes Cho Oyu special?
How does Cho Oyu's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Dhaulagiri I
cards.fact: Dhaulagiri I towers over central Nepal and was once thought to be the world's highest mountain.
readingPrompts: What makes Dhaulagiri I special?
How does Dhaulagiri I's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Manaslu
cards.fact: Manaslu means Mountain of the Spirit and is the eighth-highest mountain in the world.
readingPrompts: What makes Manaslu special?
How does Manaslu's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Nanga Parbat
cards.fact: Nanga Parbat has enormous relief from nearby valleys and is sometimes called a contender for tallest land rise.
readingPrompts: What makes Nanga Parbat special?
How does Nanga Parbat's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Annapurna I
cards.fact: Annapurna I was the first eight-thousander climbed, reached by a French expedition in 1950.
readingPrompts: What makes Annapurna I special?
How does Annapurna I's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Gasherbrum I
cards.fact: Gasherbrum I is also called Hidden Peak because it sits deep inside the Karakoram.
readingPrompts: What makes Gasherbrum I special?
How does Gasherbrum I's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Broad Peak
cards.fact: Broad Peak gets its name from its wide summit ridge near K2.
readingPrompts: What makes Broad Peak special?
How does Broad Peak's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Gasherbrum II
cards.fact: Gasherbrum II is another Karakoram eight-thousander in the Baltoro region.
readingPrompts: What makes Gasherbrum II special?
How does Gasherbrum II's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Shishapangma
cards.fact: Shishapangma is the only eight-thousander located entirely in Tibet.
readingPrompts: What makes Shishapangma special?
How does Shishapangma's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Gyachung Kang
cards.fact: Gyachung Kang is the highest peak below 8,000 meters and sits between Everest and Cho Oyu.
readingPrompts: What makes Gyachung Kang special?
How does Gyachung Kang's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Annapurna II
cards.fact: Annapurna II is a major peak on the eastern side of Nepal's Annapurna massif.
readingPrompts: What makes Annapurna II special?
How does Annapurna II's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Gasherbrum IV
cards.fact: Gasherbrum IV is famous among climbers for its beautiful shape and difficult ridges.
readingPrompts: What makes Gasherbrum IV special?
How does Gasherbrum IV's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Himalchuli
cards.fact: Himalchuli is a high peak in the Manaslu Himal of Nepal.
readingPrompts: What makes Himalchuli special?
How does Himalchuli's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Distaghil Sar
cards.fact: Distaghil Sar is the highest mountain in the Hispar Muztagh of the Karakoram.
readingPrompts: What makes Distaghil Sar special?
How does Distaghil Sar's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Ngadi Chuli
cards.fact: Ngadi Chuli is a high Manaslu-area peak with a remote, complex climbing history.
readingPrompts: What makes Ngadi Chuli special?
How does Ngadi Chuli's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Khunyang Chhish
cards.fact: Khunyang Chhish rises in Pakistan's Hispar region and is one of the highest Karakoram peaks.
readingPrompts: What makes Khunyang Chhish special?
How does Khunyang Chhish's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Masherbrum
cards.fact: Masherbrum is also known as K1 and stands above the Baltoro Glacier region.
readingPrompts: What makes Masherbrum special?
How does Masherbrum's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Nanda Devi
cards.fact: Nanda Devi is one of India's most sacred and famous Himalayan mountains.
readingPrompts: What makes Nanda Devi special?
How does Nanda Devi's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Chomo Lonzo
cards.fact: Chomo Lonzo is a high Tibetan peak close to Makalu.
readingPrompts: What makes Chomo Lonzo special?
How does Chomo Lonzo's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Batura Sar
cards.fact: Batura Sar is the highest peak of the Batura Muztagh in the western Karakoram.
readingPrompts: What makes Batura Sar special?
How does Batura Sar's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Rakaposhi
cards.fact: Rakaposhi is famous for rising dramatically above the Hunza Valley.
readingPrompts: What makes Rakaposhi special?
How does Rakaposhi's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Namcha Barwa
cards.fact: Namcha Barwa stands near the great bend of the Yarlung Tsangpo River in eastern Tibet.
readingPrompts: What makes Namcha Barwa special?
How does Namcha Barwa's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Kanjut Sar
cards.fact: Kanjut Sar is a high peak in the Hispar Muztagh of the Karakoram.
readingPrompts: What makes Kanjut Sar special?
How does Kanjut Sar's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Kamet
cards.fact: Kamet was one of the earliest very high Himalayan peaks to be climbed.
readingPrompts: What makes Kamet special?
How does Kamet's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Dhaulagiri II
cards.fact: Dhaulagiri II is part of the Dhaulagiri massif in Nepal.
readingPrompts: What makes Dhaulagiri II special?
How does Dhaulagiri II's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Aconcagua
cards.fact: Aconcagua is the highest mountain outside Asia and the tallest peak in the Americas.

How does Aconcagua's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Denali
cards.fact: Denali is North America's highest mountain and rises powerfully from the Alaska Range.

How does Denali's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Kilimanjaro
cards.fact: Mount Kilimanjaro is Africa's highest mountain and a huge freestanding volcano.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Kilimanjaro special?
How does Mount Kilimanjaro's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Elbrus
cards.fact: Mount Elbrus is a dormant volcano and is often counted as Europe's highest mountain.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Elbrus special?
How does Mount Elbrus's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Vinson
cards.fact: Mount Vinson is Antarctica's highest mountain and one of the Seven Summits.

How does Mount Vinson's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Puncak Jaya
cards.fact: Puncak Jaya is the highest island peak in the world and one version of Oceania's Seven Summit.

How does Puncak Jaya's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mont Blanc
cards.fact: Mont Blanc is the highest mountain in the Alps and a classic symbol of European mountaineering.
readingPrompts: What makes Mont Blanc special?
How does Mont Blanc's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Matterhorn
cards.fact: The Matterhorn's sharp pyramid shape makes it one of the most recognizable mountains in the world.
readingPrompts: What makes Matterhorn special?
How does Matterhorn's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Whitney
cards.fact: Mount Whitney is the highest summit in the contiguous United States.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Whitney special?
How does Mount Whitney's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mauna Kea
cards.fact: Mauna Kea is modest above sea level, but from the Pacific seafloor it rises higher than Everest.

How does Mauna Kea's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Fuji
cards.fact: Mount Fuji is Japan's highest mountain and one of the world's most famous volcano silhouettes.

How does Mount Fuji's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Aoraki / Mount Cook

cards.fact: Aoraki / Mount Cook is New Zealand's highest mountain and a centerpiece of the Southern Alps.

How does Aoraki / Mount Cook's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Rainier
cards.fact: Mount Rainier is a heavily glaciated volcano that dominates the skyline near Seattle and Tacoma.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Rainier special?
How does Mount Rainier's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Chimborazo
cards.fact: Chimborazo's summit is often described as the farthest point from Earth's center because of the equatorial bulge.

How does Chimborazo's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Kenya
cards.fact: Mount Kenya is Africa's second-highest mountain and an eroded volcanic massif.
readingPrompts: What makes Mount Kenya special?
How does Mount Kenya's elevation compare with another mountain?

cards.name: Mount Kosciuszko
cards.fact: Mount Kosciuszko is Australia's highest mainland mountain and one version of the Seven Summits.

How does Mount Kosciuszko's elevation compare with another mountain?
